wine_bars.name: Balthasar Ress Weinbar and Vinothek
wine_bars.wine_program: Estate vinothek of Weingut Balthasar Ress with by-the-glass pours from the Hattenheim VDP range plus selected Rheingau partner wineries; bottle sales at estate prices
wine_bars.description: Urban Rheingau wine bar of Weingut Balthasar Ress in the Wiesbaden pedestrian zone since 2013. Estate VDP Rieslings and Pinot Noir alongside selected partner growers, with bottle sales at producer prices.

wine_bars.name: Jo's Weinbar
wine_bars.wine_program: Wine bar and bistro on the south side of the RheinMain CongressCenter pouring Rheingau plus international selections, with daily changing dishes
wine_bars.description: Wine bar and bistro at the south wing of the RheinMain CongressCenter in Wiesbaden, opened as a central meeting point. Daily changing seasonal plates with a Rheingau-led list including international selections.

wine_bars.name: Weinhaus Sinz
wine_bars.wine_program: Family wine house in the Wiesbaden vineyards above the city, pouring regional Rheingau wines alongside seasonal regional cooking
wine_bars.description: Family wine house and restaurant in Wiesbaden-Frauenstein in the middle of the vineyards above the city. Half a century of hospitality with regional Rheingau wines and seasonal cooking.

wine_bars.name: Eltviller Weinprobierstand
wine_bars.address: Platz von Montrichard, 65343 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
wine_bars.wine_program: Cooperative tasting pavilion of eight Eltville wineries pouring rotating producers each Wednesday on the Rhine promenade, by the glass and by the bottle
wine_bars.description: Pavilion on the Rhine promenade run cooperatively by eight Eltville wineries since 1981, with the next estate taking over each Wednesday. Seasonal Frueschoppen concerts on the first Sunday of the month.

verified.address_quoted: Platz von Montrichard, 65343 Eltville am Rhein

wine_bars.name: Weinhaus Bluhm
wine_bars.wine_program: Restored wine house in a 300-year-old half-timbered building pouring wines from Rheingau, Rheinhessen, Pfalz, Nahe and France from growers personally known to the proprietor
wine_bars.description: Wine bar in a 300-year-old crooked half-timbered house in Mainz old town, reinvented in 2016 by Murielle and her father Pierre. Rheingau, Rheinhessen and French wines paired with French-Rhenish plates.

wine_bars.name: Weinstube Hottum
wine_bars.neighborhood: Mainz old town, behind the cathedral
wine_bars.wine_program: Historic Weinstube first documented in 1791 pouring Rheinhessen and Rheingau wines, with focus on Riesling, Grauburgunder and Spatburgunder
wine_bars.description: Wine tavern first documented in 1791 just behind Mainz cathedral, with dark-wood rooms and regional menus. Rheinhessen and Rheingau Riesling, Grauburgunder and Spatburgunder by the glass.

wine_bars.name: Weinhaus Michel
wine_bars.wine_program: Vaulted-cellar wine bar on the foundations of the former Jakobsberg monastery pouring Rheinhessen wines from the family Weinolsheim estate and Rheingau guests
wine_bars.description: Vaulted-cellar wine bar in central Mainz on the foundations of the former Jakobsberg monastery. Owner-winemaker Stefan Michel pours his family Weinolsheim wines alongside Rheinhessen and Rheingau bottles.

wine_bars.name: Lindenwirt Weingarten
wine_bars.wine_program: Wine garden on the Drosselgasse with Rheingau Rieslings and Spatburgunder by the glass, plus the in-house Wirtshaus zum Drosselmueller
wine_bars.description: Wine tavern and garden on the Drosselgasse opened in 1927 as the second on the lane. Run by the third generation of the Ohlig family with Rheingau Rieslings and Spatburgunder in the courtyard.

wine_bars.name: Drosselhof
wine_bars.wine_program: Historic tavern at the head of the Drosselgasse pouring Rheingau Rieslings and the local Assmannshaeuser Spatburgunder by the glass and bottle
wine_bars.description: Tavern at the head of the Drosselgasse in Ruedesheim, founded as a wine-house tradition stretching back to 1727. Rheingau Riesling and Assmannshaeuser Spatburgunder in a half-timbered hall and the cobbled courtyard.

wine_bars.name: Ruedesheimer Schloss
wine_bars.wine_program: Wine tavern in a 1729 former tithe barn off the Drosselgasse pouring Rheingau Riesling, Spatburgunder and Sekt alongside regional cooking
wine_bars.description: Family-run wine tavern in a 1729 former tithe barn at the corner of the Drosselgasse and Steingasse in Ruedesheim. Rheingau Rieslings and Assmannshaeuser Spatburgunder paired with regional plates.
